rawMetadata: {"compiler":{"version":"0.8.28+commit.7893614a"},"language":"Solidity","output":{"abi":[{"inputs":[{"internalType":"uint256","name":"index","type":"uint256"},{"internalType":"bytes","name":"data","type":"bytes"}],"name":"CallFailed","type":"error"},{"inputs":[],"name":"InvalidOperation","type":"error"},{"inputs":[],"name":"OnlyDelegatecall","type":"error"}],"devdoc":{"details":"MUST be invoked via `delegatecall` from the caller's AgentAccount so      `msg.sender` for each inner call is the AgentAccount itself. We      enforce this with the `_self` immutable trick: at deploy time we      stash the deployment address; at `multiSend` entry we revert if      `address(this) != _self` (i.e., we *aren't* in delegatecall context).      Wait \u2014 that's actually backwards. The whole point of delegatecall is      that `address(this)` becomes the caller's address (NOT this library's).      So we revert when `address(this) == _self`, i.e., when called normally.      That guards against accidental top-level invocation.      Packed format per entry:        {1 byte op}{20 bytes target}{32 bytes value}{32 bytes dataLen}{dataLen bytes data}      where op MUST be 0 (call). This is the call-only variant \u2014 the full      Safe MultiSend supports op=1 (delegatecall) but we explicitly disallow      it here because delegatecall from a treasury smart account is a      footgun that nullifies all of our caveat enforcement.      This contract is stateless. It is safe to deploy once per chain and      delegatecall from any AgentAccount.","kind":"dev","methods":{},"title":"MultiSendCallOnly","version":1},"userdoc":{"kind":"user","methods":{},"notice":"Atomic batched-call library mirroring Safe's `MultiSendCallOnly`.         Disbursement path needs `USDC.transfer(...)` + `ClassAssertion.emitClassAssertion(...)`         to land in one userOp; this library provides the atomicity without         changing `AgentAccount.execute`'s ABI.","version":1}},"settings":{"compilationTarget":{"src/MultiSendCallOnly.sol":"MultiSendCallOnly"},"evmVersion":"prague","libraries":{},"metadata":{"bytecodeHash":"ipfs"},"optimizer":{"enabled":true,"runs":200},"remappings":[":@openzeppelin/contracts/=lib/openzeppelin-contracts/contracts/",":account-abstraction/=lib/account-abstraction/contracts/",":erc4626-tests/=lib/openzeppelin-contracts/lib/erc4626-tests/",":forge-std/=lib/forge-std/src/",":halmos-cheatcodes/=lib/openzeppelin-contracts/lib/halmos-cheatcodes/src/",":openzeppelin-contracts/=lib/openzeppelin-contracts/"],"viaIR":true},"sources":{"src/MultiSendCallOnly.sol":{"keccak256":"0x11b5a59dc4f99da63f4caba35eb59b45bb3777604d71fc06686ea7856e9668cf","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://5d527964f5a8e790ca6ccb83a7e949abd869d3770e2c422bc7f40844a24c02f8","dweb:/ipfs/QmXMkmBdvMKSv5dBpm16qt9L38CKcWgp7bL4RzZdLwrUmZ"]}},"version":1}
